@graph.name: usdpr. — Bring back your lost dental patients

mainEntity.name: Is this legal in my state?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We only contact your existing patients, under your practice name — follow-up care, not solicitation. We charge a flat SaaS fee, never per-patient, keeping the arrangement inside anti-kickback and patient-brokering safe harbors in every state.

We sign a Business Associate Agreement before any patient data moves. Every message passes a PHI scrubber. Every send, reply, and booking is logged in an append-only audit log. Data sits on encrypted volumes.

mainEntity.name: What does my front desk have to do?

acceptedAnswer.text: Four things: export your patient list (or connect your PMS directly); approve our templates; receive warm handoffs when patients are ready to book; tell us who showed up for the weekly report.
Cancel in one click. No per-patient invoice, no cancellation fee. Data export is free and always available via /onboarding/export or /api/v1.

mainEntity.name: Why flat fee and not pay-per-rebook?

acceptedAnswer.text: Per-patient payments trigger anti-kickback and patient-brokering statutes in most states (Florida's Patient Brokering Act treats it as a third-degree felony). Flat SaaS fee keeps the arrangement compliant and keeps incentives aligned on quality, not volume.

mainEntity.name: How fast can I actually start?

acceptedAnswer.text: Checkout takes under 90 seconds. BAA auto-signs via HelloSign. Upload your CSV when you're ready. Email campaigns go live on day one; SMS layers in once the carrier approves your 10DLC brand (2–3 weeks).

mainEntity.name: What dental software do you work with?

acceptedAnswer.text: Open Dental has a direct REST API integration available today. Dentrix, Eaglesoft, Curve Dental, and Dentrix Ascend are supported via partner-program activation (1–4 weeks). CSV upload works with any PMS.
